name: Infected Weevil

attacks.name: Infected Self-Destruct
attacks.tell: It runs toward the threat, squeals several times, and starts swelling before detonating.
attacks.howToAvoid: Back away as soon as it starts charging; if you hit it during the charge, the timer resets and buys you a little more room.
attacks.notes: It explodes at close range or after completing the charge, damaging everything nearby and shaving roughly 10% durability off any gear caught in the blast.

description: A weevil corrupted by the Haze fungus. Unlike a normal weevil, its only goal is to close the distance and self-destruct on any target.
behavior: It wanders aimlessly until it notices a threat. It then speeds up immediately and tries to reach very short range before starting its self-destruct.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player and does not try to trade normal hits: it only wants to reach you and explode. If the blast catches you, you also lose gear durability.
interactionWithCreatures: It detonates against almost any non-infected creature. Other infected creatures usually ignore it until friendly fire reaches them.
strategy: It is not worth a prolonged exchange. The best option is to kill it at range or hit it during the charge to reset the detonation and buy time to retreat.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. Outside the Haze it takes 3 days.
specialTraits: It is immune to gas hazard. If the blast hits you, your weapons and armor can lose around 10% durability even if they were almost untouched.
